The '''IT-series utility droid''' was a series of [[Maintenance droid/Legends|maintenance droid]] manufactured by [[Duwani Mechanical Products/Legends|Duwani Mechanical Products]] prior to the introduction of the [[T3-series utility droid]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
